text:
It is unknown whether the 
beneficiary has creditable 
prescription drug coverage 
elsewhere. 

Null/missing = Beneficiary was not 
found in cost sharing group data 

COMMENT: CMS identifies beneficiaries with fully-subsidized Part D coverage by looking for individuals that have a 
01, 02, or 03 for the month. Other beneficiaries who are eligible for the LIS but do not receive a full 
subsidy have a 04, 05, 06, 07, or 08. The remaining values indicate that the individual is not eligible for
